DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF 3565 GEARY LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY'S MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION IS GRANTED AND WAS UNOPPOSED. DEFENDANT STEVEN LY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THIS COURT'S APRIL 12, 2013 DISCOVERY ORDER. HE IS GIVEN A FINAL CHANCE FOR COMPLIANCE WITH THAT ORDER WITHIN TWENTY DAYS OF THE DATE OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER WITH NOTICE OF ENTRY. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE WITHIN ORDER MAY RESULT IN IMPOSITION OF AN EVIDENTIARY OR TERMINATING SANCTION. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF 3565 GEARY LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED, BASED ON MOVING PAPERS. MOTION ALREADY HAS BEEN CONTINUED ONCE FOR PARTIES TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS IN ACCORDANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. IN ADDITION, MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $704 ARE GRANTED, TO BE PAID WITHIN 20 DAYS OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. KATHERINE HUIBONHOA, JUDGE PRO-TEM, CYNTHIA HERBERT, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF 3565 GEARY LLC'S MOTION TO SANCTION DEFENDANT FOR VIOLATION OF COURT ORDER IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 24, 2014 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 17, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). ANY PARTY WHO CONTESTS A TENTATIVE RULING MUST SEND AN EMAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG WITH A COPY TO ALL OTHER PARTIES BY 4PM STATING, WITHOUT ARGUMENT, THE PORTION(S) OF THE TENTATIVE RULING THAT THE PARTY CONTESTS. THE SUBJECT LINE OF THE EMAIL SHALL INCLUDE THE LINE NUMBER, CASE NAME AND CASE NUMBER. JUDGE PRO TEM STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF 3565 GEARY LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY's Motion To Compel is Granted. Plaintiff's motion is granted and was unopposed. Defendant Steven Ly failed to comply with this Court's April 12, 2013 discovery order. He is given a final chance for compliance with that order within twenty days of the date of service of this order with notice of entry. Failure to comply with the within order may result in imposition of an evidentiary or terminating sanction. Order is signed in open Court. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sanction Deft For Violation Of Court Order;
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Continued To Jun-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF 3565 GEARY LLC's Motion To Sanction Defendant For Violation Of Court Order is continued to June 24, 2014 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 17, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties by 4pm stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. The subject line of the email shall include the line number, case name and case number. Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.
